title: chamaecrista celiae
intro: Chamaecrista celiae, also known as leafless sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in various parts of the world, particularly in Africa, to treat various ailments due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Chamaecrista celiae can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
